case_title: DONNA CHEN VS. ARLENE JOAQUIN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-22-2014 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT JOAQUIN, ARLENE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-22-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-07-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-15-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-15-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-05-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
